name: BinaryEdge
description: BinaryEdge scans the entire Internet to create a real-time threat intelligence data feed and search engine. It provides data on exposed services, vulnerabilities, torrents, dataleaks, and domain intelligence.

actions.name: Query IP
actions.description: Retrieve all available information about a host including exposed ports, services, banners, protocols, and detected vulnerabilities.

actions.name: Query IP Historical
actions.description: Retrieve historical event data for a host over the last 6 months showing service changes and vulnerability discoveries over time.

parameters.name: target
parameters.description: The IP address to query historical data for

actions.name: Host Search
actions.description: Search BinaryEdge's host database using query filters for services, ports, products, countries, ASNs, and more.

parameters.name: only_ips
parameters.description: Set to 1 to return only IP addresses matching the query

actions.name: Host Search Stats
actions.description: Get statistical aggregations for a search query including breakdowns by port, product, country, ASN, and protocol.

actions.name: Query Subdomains
actions.description: Enumerate known subdomains for a given domain from BinaryEdge's DNS dataset.

parameters.name: target
parameters.description: The domain name to enumerate subdomains for (e.g., 'example.com')

actions.name: Query DNS Records
actions.description: Retrieve DNS records (A, AAAA, NS, MX) for a given domain from BinaryEdge's DNS database.

parameters.name: target
parameters.description: The domain name to query DNS records for

actions.name: Query IP CVEs
actions.description: Retrieve CVEs (Common Vulnerabilities and Exposures) that affect a specific IP address based on detected services and versions.

parameters.name: target
parameters.description: The IP address to query CVEs for

actions.name: Query Sensors
actions.description: Check if an IP address has been observed by BinaryEdge honeypot sensors, indicating potential malicious scanning or attack activity.

parameters.name: target
parameters.description: The IP address to query sensor data for
